# d8903e5f-561f-4a9e-9c4d-88b8b74a6724 — Auto-Generated Cypress Tests

Generated by [TestQ](https://testq.ai). Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten on next push.

## Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+
- A running instance of the application under test

## Setup

```bash
npm install
```

## Run Tests

```bash
# Run all tests headless
npm test

# Run with browser visible
npm run test:headed

# Open Cypress UI
npm run test:open
```

## Structure

```
cypress/
  e2e/
    {pbi-id}/               ← specs grouped by PBI
      {scenario}.cy.js      ← one spec per scenario
  fixtures/
    {pbi-id}.selectors.json ← selectors shared across all scenarios of a PBI
  support/
    e2e.js                  ← global entry point
    commands/
      index.js              ← auto-imports all PBI command files
      {pbi-id}.commands.js  ← commands shared across all scenarios of a PBI
    utils.js                ← shared utilities
package.json
cypress.config.js
```
